programme.title: Secretly Pregnant
programme.desc: Richanne is diagnosed with a brain tumor and pregnant; Paola's pregnancy could ruin her career.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant
programme.desc: Sandra relationship with her daughters; Dannielle risks her relationship with her grandfather.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant
programme.desc: Charity's sixth child is on the way; Natasha fears her boyfriend will leave her.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant
programme.desc: Amy's ninth child; Destiny is pregnant with twins at age 20.

programme.title: Trauma: Life in the ER
programme.desc: The doctors and nurses of Good Samaritan Regional Medical Center pursue diverse goals at the Level One Trauma Center.

programme.title: Trauma: Life in the ER
programme.desc: The staff at Rocky Mountain Regional Trauma Center in Denver treats victims of accidents, violence and illness.

programme.title: Trauma: Life in the ER
programme.desc: Victims of car crash, scalding, burn.

programme.title: Trauma: Life in the ER
programme.desc: Victims of shootings, stabbings, heroin overdose.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: A teenage girl is impaled through the neck on an iron fence; a patient is convinced he's turning into a vampire; a first-year attending physician stands up to a room full of senior specialists to save the life of a critically ill pregnant woman.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: The ER is a crime scene when a woman's belly pain is caused by smuggled narcotics; a doctor is mystified by heart attacks occurring the same day in the same family; strange markings on the body of a car crash victim lead to the cause of the accident.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Two seemingly unrelated gunshot wounds lead to a bizarre night in the ER; a senior nurse unravels at the sight of a critical patient, and reveals a shocking secret; a patient's grave symptoms mysteriously disappear whenever the doctor touches him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: A woman comes in with a piece of rebar impaling her thigh; a man brings his girlfriend into the ER for an STD workup; an ER doctor confronts a woman's prejudiced colleagues.

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Liz, completely bed-bound, has severe lymphedema that makes it impossible to walk; utterly isolated, Liz has no friends, battles depression and lives with a mother too ill to take care of her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Bedridden Marla is so heavy she cannot stand up; she must face the hard truth about her condition and understand the toll it takes on her supportive family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Chay has eaten his way to 600 pounds to cope with the emotional turmoil of his childhood; he loses his emotional support and searches for new strength to take control of his life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: After a difficult childhood with an abusive stepfather and drug-addicted mother, Sarah is fighting for her life at only 24 years old.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: With the support of his fiancé, Kathryn, Robert turns to Dr. Nowzaradan in a final, desperate attempt to save his life; he tries to reverse a lifelong food addiction that has left him bed-bound, saddled with grotesque lymphedema, and nearly 900-lbs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: At over 700 pounds, Brianne undertakes a weight-loss journey to save her own life; she faces an unexpected challenge to her fragile progress when her husband suffers a heart attack on a birthday she will never forget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Octavia has been bedbound for nearly a year when she decides to make the trip to Houston to get help from Dr. Now, but when it turns out that her best friend is also her worst enabler, Octavia will have to choose between old habits and a new life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Robin and her brother Chris are both obese and already lost a sibling to obesity; they plan to visit Dr. Now together when Chris suffers a stroke and can't go; Chris' son Garrett, already 600 pounds at age 20, is game to join the journey.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: A college graduate with a once-promising career, Justin has eaten his life away to the point of never leaving the house for anything but food; only the help of Dr. Now's weight-loss program can restore his hopes of living a happy, productive life.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My 600-Lb. Life
programme.desc: Holly already has one failed weight loss surgery, so to succeed this time, she must do more than change her eating habits, she must address the childhood issues that continue to plague her.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Kenny was born with a rare condition that causes hundreds of lumps to grow all over his body; Ebonee covers the tiny bumps on her eyes with sunglasses; Paula's painful and swollen feet ooze a substance that emits a foul odor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Jacqueline's massive shoulder growth makes it difficult for her to do her favorite hobby of fire spinning; the mysterious bump on James' cheek loves to bleed; Mikalia has possessed a bumpy, smelly mass on her head since birth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: After losing his longtime love, Joe wants the large bumps all over his head removed; the itchy, painful rash on Nisa's ears spreads to her face; Jennifer has dark spots all over her face that nobody is allowed to see.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Cedric has a bump on his eye and a painful lump on his neck that have kept him from working; Katherine's large ear cluster puts her neighborhood watch job at risk; Andrea uses makeup to cover the white spots all over her face and body.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Jimmy's flaky, raised alligator skin feels like an itchy hell, and he wants it cured so he can find love; Djuka is a stubborn guy with a stubborn bump; Talina has hundreds of tumors all over her body, causing embarrassment and discomfort.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Brittney has hundreds of tiny bumps over her chest that have destroyed her confidence; John has a nose the size of a plum and leans on his local family clinic for help; Dr. Lee's friend Raquel drops in and brings out her wild side.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Mike's religious beliefs have kept him from seeing a doctor about his huge growth; Kylie has come to love her birthmark and is torn about whether to get it removed; Shad's head bump bursts open and smells like death.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Tyler's hands are so dry, cracked and painful that he considers getting them amputated; Ebonee covers the tiny bumps around her eyes with sunglasses; Ralph feels like a cyst factory with painful cysts covering his back.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Kelly has a massive shoulder growth; Erica stabbed her hand with a pencil 45 years ago and believes the lead remains trapped in her palm; Paula's painful and swollen feet ooze a substance that emits the foulest of odors.
